summary.intent: The user wanted to: (1) create a reusable skill for waiting on Codex PR reviews with an automatic re-trigger loop, (2) document it in CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md as mandatory post-push, and (3) implement a faster local CI profile (`cargo xci --profile fast`) that skips coverage and feature-matrix steps to serve as a ~5-minute pre-push gate.
summary.outcome: All three goals were completed and committed to PR #648: the `waiting-for-codex-review` skill was created in `.agents/skills/`, AGENTS.md was updated with step 12 mandating the skill and step 9 updated for fast profile usage, and `cargo xci --profile fast` / `cargo xci-fast` were implemented and verified to run in 1m 24s (vs. ~25min full).

repo: `.claude/skills/` is a symlink into `.agents/skills/` — skills must be written to `.agents/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` to actually land in the repo.
`CLAUDE.md` is a symlink to `AGENTS.md`; edits must target `AGENTS.md` directly.
Codex bot login is `chatgpt-codex-connector` on this install; detection should use case-insensitive substring match on `codex` for forward-compat.
Codex signals: 👀 = review in progress, 👀 disappears = review finished (either 👍 added for approval OR threads posted for changes requested — never both).
Codex does not reliably auto-trigger on new pushes; posting `@codex review` as a top-level comment is required both on first PR push and after resolving all review threads.
`cargo xci` full run takes ~25 minutes locally; bottlenecks are `Coverage` (~15 min, wasm32 `-Cinstrument-coverage` with nightly + LLVM 22) and five `FeatureMatrix*` steps (~5 min).
The fast profile of 10 steps ran in 1m 24s wall-clock on a warm cache, well under the 5-min target.
`ars-components` coverage threshold is 90/90 (line and branch), enforced in `xtask/src/coverage.rs`.
Snapshot files live in `crates/ars-components/src/utility/snapshots/` with naming convention `ars_components__utility__{module}__tests__{name}.snap`.
`GroupContext` naming (not `Context`) is required by foundation 08 §8.4 so consumers write `group::GroupContext`.

code.finding: Step enum and PIPELINE_ORDER constant live here; FAST_PIPELINE_ORDER was added adjacent to PIPELINE_ORDER with the 10 fast steps.
Existing tests module starts here; 7 new profile-related tests were added and 4 existing `resolve_steps` call sites updated to pass the new Profile arg.
Command::Ci variant definition; `--profile <full|fast>` flag added here with default Full for backward compat.
`xci-fast = 'xtask ci --profile fast'` alias added so both `cargo xci --profile fast` and `cargo xci-fast` work.
Canonical structural template for new stateless utility components (Props, Part, Api, ConnectApi pattern without state machine or Service).
Reference pattern for context structs (more complex example than separator).

workflow: Skills should live in the repo (`.agents/skills/`) not globally (`~/.claude/skills/`) unless intentionally cross-project.
Post-push Codex review loop: push → comment `@codex review` → poll for 👀 to appear then disappear → if 👍 done, if threads appear address them → push fix → comment `@codex review` → repeat.
The `waiting-for-codex-review` skill uses Monitor for event-driven polling (one notification per state change) to avoid burning context on tight polling loops.
CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md mandate `waiting-for-codex-review` after every push to a PR (step 12) and require Codex 👍 before closing an issue (step 13).
Fast profile is the routine pre-push gate; full `cargo xci` is reserved for final pre-PR run or after substantial refactors affecting feature-flag interactions.
Positional step arguments to `cargo xci` override the profile — `cargo xci --profile fast i18n-browser dom-browser` re-adds skipped steps for wasm-touching changes.

friction: Multiple rounds of skill iteration were needed due to incremental corrections: (1) initial reaction lifecycle was wrong (👍 disappears vs. 👀 disappears), (2) `@codex review` re-trigger not in original draft, (3) initial `@codex review` on first push not in draft — each required separate edit passes.
CLAUDE.md symlink indirection caused an initial edit to the wrong file before the symlink target was discovered.
Step renumbering after inserting a new step 2 required multiple sequential edits to fix cross-references scattered throughout the skill file.
The `resolve_steps` signature change required finding and updating 4 existing call sites in the tests module to pass the new Profile argument.
open_items: Task #205 (Group agnostic core) implementation — the plan is fully written in the plan file but was not executed in this session; it remains Todo on the project board.
PR #648's actual review thread on `group.rs:245` from `chatgpt-codex-connector` was identified but never addressed — the session ended after committing the infra changes.
`--exclude <step>` flag for ad-hoc subtraction from a profile — deferred as a follow-up.
Pre-push git hook that auto-runs `cargo xci-fast` — deferred; enforcement is currently via CLAUDE.md habit.
Promoting `--profile fast` to the `cargo xci` no-arg default — deferred pending telemetry on whether anyone uses full local run.
Leptos and Dioxus adapters for the Group component — separate tasks per the project board.
Wiring `GroupContext` consumption into existing child components (Button, TextField, etc.) — deferred until adapter components exist.
